mapper.select:
SELECT d.id,
CONCAT(e.brand_en,"-",d.vehicle_model) brand_model, d.vehicle_version_en vehicle_version,
CONCAT(e.brand,"-",d.vehicle_model) brand_model, d.vehicle_version,
d.test_date, d.vehicle_system_version, d.status, d.vehicle_type FROM `vehicle_base_info` d , vehicle_brand e where e.id=d.brand_id

select h.id,
CONCAT(g.brand_en,"-",h.vehicle_model) vehicle_name, h.vehicle_version_en vehicle_version, h.energy_type_en energy_type, h.chip_information_en chip_information,
CONCAT(g.brand,"-",h.vehicle_model) vehicle_name, h.vehicle_version, h.energy_type, h.chip_information,
h.vehicle_picture, h.vehicle_system_version, h.test_date, h.time_to_market, h.endurance_mileage, h.model_name, h.status FROM vehicle_base_info h left join vehicle_brand g on h.brand_id = g.id

select h.id,
CONCAT(g.brand_en,"-",h.vehicle_model) vehicle_name, h.vehicle_version_en vehicle_version, h.energy_type_en energy_type, h.chip_information_en chip_information,
CONCAT(g.brand,"-",h.vehicle_model) vehicle_name, h.vehicle_version, h.energy_type, h.chip_information,
h.vehicle_picture, h.vehicle_system_version, h.test_date, h.time_to_market, h.endurance_mileage, h.model_name, h.chip_information FROM vehicle_base_info h left join vehicle_brand g on h.brand_id = g.id where h.id = #{id}

SELECT d.id, CONCAT(e.brand, "-", d.vehicle_model) brand_model, d.test_date, d.vehicle_version, d.vehicle_system_version FROM `vehicle_base_info` d, vehicle_brand e where e.id = d.brand_id and d.id in #{ids}

SELECT
CONCAT(vb.brand_en, '-', vbi.vehicle_model) AS vehicle_model_info,
CONCAT(vb.brand, '-', vbi.vehicle_model) AS vehicle_model_info,
vbi.id , vbi.vehicle_system_version as vehicle_system_version, vbi.test_date as test_date, AVG(vdt.presentation_value) AS avg_score FROM vehicle_base_info vbi LEFT JOIN vehicle_brand vb ON vbi.brand_id = vb.id LEFT JOIN vehicle_domain_tree vdt ON vdt.vehicle_base_id = vbi.id LEFT JOIN vehicle_domain_index vdi ON vdi.id = vdt.domain_index_id WHERE vdi.id = #{domainIndexId} and vdt.presentation_value>0
and vbi.id IN
#{id}
GROUP BY vbi.id,
vb.brand,
vb.brand_en,
vbi.vehicle_model,vbi.vehicle_system_version,vbi.test_date;

select CONCAT(b.brand,'-',a.vehicle_model,'-',a.vehicle_system_version) vehicle_name,a.id vehicle_id from vehicle_base_info a left join vehicle_brand b on a.brand_id = b.id WHERE b.brand IS NOT NULL AND a.vehicle_model IS NOT NULL AND a.vehicle_system_version IS NOT NULL;

select CONCAT(b.brand_en,'-',a.vehicle_model,'-',a.vehicle_system_version) vehicle_name,a.id vehicle_id from vehicle_base_info a left join vehicle_brand b on a.brand_id = b.id WHERE b.brand IS NOT NULL AND a.vehicle_model IS NOT NULL AND a.vehicle_system_version IS NOT NULL;

select
CONCAT(f.brand,"-",e.vehicle_model) vehicle_name
CONCAT(f.brand_en,"-",e.vehicle_model) vehicle_name
,count(a.vehicle_id) counta from vehicle_function_tree a left join vehicle_function_three_tag b on a.function_three_tag_id = b.id left join vehicle_function_two_tag c on c.id = b.function_two_tag_id left join vehicle_function_one_tag d ON d.id = c.function_one_tag_id left JOIN vehicle_base_info e ON e.id = a.vehicle_id left JOIN vehicle_brand f ON f.id = e.brand_id where a.function_list != 4 and a.function_list != 0 AND d.id != 456422482807619584 GROUP BY a.vehicle_id
,f.brand
,f.brand_en
,e.vehicle_model
